title: helianthemum fumana var. procumbens
intro: Helianthemum fumana var. procumbens is a low-growing, spreading shrub that belongs to the rockrose family, characterized by its pink to white flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The health benefits of Helianthemum fumana var. procumbens include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
